title: OPPORTUNITIES

joinTeam.heading: We are looking for advisors, partners and early contributors.

advisors.title: Advisors
advisors.description: If you are a Leader or Expert in a relevant field or industry and would like to join us as an Advisor,

partners.title: Partners
partners.description: If you represent an entity, company or project that wishes to partner with us,

members.title: Founding Members
members.description: If you are interested in joining Nasun as a Founding Member, please check the positions available below and contact us.

position3: Unreal Engine Developer in C++ with background in AWS Gamelift and other AWS Services.

buildProject.heading: Build your project with us.
buildProject.description: Nasun is a permissionless network designed to empower builders and creators. If you're developing a project that aligns with our vision, we're here to support you. Tell us what you're building — and how we can help bring it to life.
